title: lychee configuration
description:
Configuration for lychee, the fast asynchronous link checker.
https://lychee.cli.rs/guides/config/

files_from.description: Read input filenames from the given file or stdin if the path is '-'.

no_progress.description: Do not show the interactive progress bar.

host_stats.description: Show per-host statistics at the end of the run.

default_extension.description: File extension used to parse input sources without a recognized file type.

max_cache_age.description: Discard cached requests older than this duration, such as '2d' or '12h'.

cache_exclude_status.description: Status codes or ranges ignored from the cache.

dump_inputs.description: Dump inputs instead of extracting or checking links.

archive.description: Web archive to use for suggestions.

suggest.description: Suggest link replacements for broken links.

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retries per request.

max_concurrency.description: Maximum number of concurrent network requests.

host_concurrency.description: Default maximum concurrent requests per host.

host_request_interval.description: Default minimum interval between requests to the same host, such as '50ms' or '1s'.

user_agent.description: User agent sent with each request.

insecure.description: Proceed for server connections considered insecure.

scheme.description: URL schemes to check, such as http, https, file, and mailto.

offline.description: Only check local files and block network requests.

include.description: URLs to check, with preference over excludes. Values are regular expressions.

exclude.description: URLs and mail addresses excluded from checking. Values are regular expressions.

exclude_path.description: Paths excluded from checking. Values are regular expressions.

exclude_all_private.description: Exclude all private, link-local, and loopback IP ranges.

exclude_loopback.description: Exclude loopback IP address ranges and localhost.

fallback_extensions.description: Fallback extensions to apply when a URL does not specify one.

index_files.description: Index file names used to resolve directory links.

header.description: Custom request headers applied to all requests.

accept.description: Accepted status codes or ranges for valid links.

timeout.description: Website timeout in seconds from connect to response finished.

retry_wait_time.description: Minimum wait time in seconds between retries.

method.description: Request method or ordered list of fallback methods.

base_url.description: Base URL or absolute path used to resolve relative URLs in local files.

root_dir.description: Root directory used when checking absolute local links.

basic_auth.description: HTTP basic auth selectors in the form 'example.com user:password'.

github_token.description: GitHub API token used to avoid rate limiting on github.com links.

no_ignore.description: Do not skip files ignored by ignore files.

hidden.description: Do not skip hidden directories and files.

include_verbatim.description: Check links inside code and preformatted blocks.

glob_ignore_case.description: Ignore case when expanding filesystem path glob inputs.

output.description: Output file for the status report.

format.description: Output format for the final status report.

generate.description: Generate special output instead of checking links.

require_https.description: Treat HTTP links as errors when HTTPS is available.

cookie_jar.description: File used to read and write cookies.

preprocess.description: Command used to preprocess input files.

hosts.description: Host-specific rate limiting and header overrides.

concurrency.description: Maximum concurrent requests allowed for this host.

request_interval.description: Minimum interval between requests to this host.

headers.description: Custom request headers for this host.
